pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly checks this file path to evaluate the task.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which parses this file path to evaluate condition structure and logic.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which synthetically generates stimuli images and saves them to this directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated stimuli images located in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli. The agent must create an experiment configuration file saved exactly to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/face_inversion.psyexp and a conditions CSV file saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/inversion_conditions.csv. These file paths were confirmed to be correct through the task's setup and verification scripts.
